name: cde-glossary
title: Business Glossary & Term Reach
description: CDE-authored — term reach by glossary, classified-vs-unclassified coverage & top terms over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: TermsByGlossary
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopTerms
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: Classified
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Classified' AS label, count(DISTINCT entity_key) AS assets FROM fact_entity_term UNION ALL SELECT 'Unclassified', GREATEST((SELECT SUM(entity_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) - (SELECT count(DISTINCT entity_key) FROM fact_entity_term),0)
